query:
-- Check Vocus Xero services - do they have real supplier data?
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, avcId, phoneNumber, serviceType
FROM services
WHERE dataSource LIKE '%Xero%' AND provider = 'Vocus'
  AND externalId IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
LIMIT 20;

-- Check Unknown Xero services - what are they?
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, serviceType, serviceCategory
FROM services
WHERE dataSource LIKE '%Xero%' AND provider = 'Unknown'
  AND externalId IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Check SasBoss Xero services - sample
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, serviceType, serviceCategory
FROM services
WHERE dataSource LIKE '%Xero%' AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND externalId IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Check Vocus Xero services - do they have real supplier data?

FROM services
WHERE dataSource LIKE '%Xero%' AND provider = 'Vocus'
  AND externalId IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
LIMIT 20;

-- Check Unknown Xero services - what are they?
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, serviceType, serviceCategory
FROM services
WHERE dataSource LIKE '%Xero%' AND provider = 'Unknown'
  AND externalId IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Check SasBoss Xero services - sample
SELECT externalId, planName, provider, monthlyCost, serviceType, serviceCategory
FROM services
WHERE dataSource LIKE '%Xero%' AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND externalId IN (SELECT serviceExternalId FROM service_billing_assignments)
ORDER BY monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 10;
